field_values.action_summary: Dorothy, Toto, and their companions struggle through disagreeable bogs and marshes before entering a vast, ancient forest characterized by massive trees and thick moss.
field_values.emotional_beat: From physical exhaustion/discomfort to a sense of awe and foreboding.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide shots of landscape scale; Medium tracking shots of group movement through mud; Close-ups of feet in bogs and mossy textures
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Mud accumulation levels on clothing and limbs
Lighting shift from open marsh to dense forest canopy
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH021_SC001

## Production Intent
Establish the physical toll of the marshland terrain and execute a visual transition from open, muddy bogs into the claustrophobic, massive scale of an ancient forest.

## Required Cast
- dorothy
- toto
- the_scarecrow
- tin_woodman
- Lion

## Required Environments
- marshland_bog_complex
- ancient_forest_interior

## Continuity Constraints
- Mud accumulation levels on clothing and limbs (increasing through BT002)
- Lighting shift from open/diffuse marsh to dense, low-key forest canopy shadow

## Beat List
- BT001: Group traverses the marshland.
- BT002: Physical struggle with terrain (mud/moss focus).
- BT003: Entry into the ancient forest (awe/foreboding shift).
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
